response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering skills and adaptability across tech stacks, they lack several critical required qualifications for this embedded networking security role. Most critically, there is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency (an explicit requirement), no recent C programming expertise (last significant work in 2014-2015), no embedded systems development in the past decade, and no background in security technologies or networking protocols. The career trajectory has moved consistently away from embedded systems toward web and cloud technologies.
strengths: Extensive software engineering background (15+ years) with proven ability to learn diverse tech stacks and domains
Experience with Linux systems, Docker, and infrastructure-as-code relevant to embedded system management
Strong technical leadership and mentorship demonstrated through open-source projects and teaching
concerns: No native-level Japanese language proficiency—a mandatory required qualification
No recent C programming expertise; last significant C/C++ work ended in 2014-2015, over a decade ago
Career trajectory entirely focused on web/cloud technologies with zero embedded systems or security domain experience

key_factors.factor: Outdated C and embedded systems expertise
No security domain knowledge or networking protocol experience
